title: ocimum cyclophyllum
intro: Ocimum cyclophyllum, also known as Wild Basil, is a plant species in the mint family that is commonly found in tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and antifungal activities, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Ocimum cyclophyllum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its use in traditional medicine to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Ocimum cyclophyllum is often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
